descriptions: Expand the `strategy` domain keywords to include more common variations of Founder's Office and Chief of Staff roles, as per SPEC.md v0.4, to improve ingestion and classification of these roles.

Correct the logic for extracting company names from iimjobs URLs. The current regex `re.sub(r'-\d+$', '', company_slug)` incorrectly strips numeric IDs that are part of the company name itself, not just standalone job IDs. This change ensures only standalone numeric IDs at the very end of the slug are removed, preventing valid company names from being truncated or misidentified as 'Unknown'.
